scope: Pass B full-surface expansion over the Metadata API category specifically (this connector's declared, narrower scope -- distinct from Zoho Analytics' separate Modeling/Bulk/Data-Manipulation/Workspace-Management API categories, which cover workspace/view/table/column CRUD and are out of scope for a connector named and documented as the metadata-only surface). Every documented metadata-api.html sub-page was enumerated by direct URL probing (the page's own client-rendered nav could not be scraped statically) and read individually: 11 GET list/detail endpoints and 2 POST mutation endpoints (data-sync triggers, not object CRUD) is the complete real surface. The 3 legacy-parity streams (workspaces, views, tables) keep their pre-existing simplified flat-path shape (GET /workspaces, /views, /tables) untouched -- that shape was a legacy connector simplification of the real workspace-scoped API, already reviewed/passing, and out of scope to alter under a parity mandate. New streams model the REAL workspace-scoped paths honestly since there is no legacy behavior constraining them.

excluded.reason: detail-by-id view of a record already fully emitted by the workspaces list stream
detail-by-id view of a record already fully emitted by the views list stream

requires a specific view-id, not just a workspace-id; there is no id-list this bundle already collects to fan this out over (folders/query_tables/datasources are all workspace-scoped only, never view-scoped) without a fan_out spec keyed on a view id list the connector has no other reason to enumerate

takes an opaque CONFIG JSON query parameter whose shape depends on which workspace/view/table metadata is being requested (the parameter's own fields vary per Zoho's docs by target object type); this has no fixed declarative shape a single streams.json entry can express
workspace creation lives under Zoho Analytics' separate Workspace Management API category, not the Metadata API this connector's name/docs_url scope it to
workspace deletion lives under the separate Workspace Management API category, out of this connector's metadata-only scope
view/table creation lives under Zoho Analytics' separate Modeling API category, out of this connector's metadata-only scope
view/column rename and structural edits live under the separate Modeling API category, out of scope
view/table deletion lives under the separate Modeling API category, out of scope
row-level data export lives under Zoho Analytics' separate Bulk API category, out of this connector's metadata-only scope
row-level data import lives under Zoho Analytics' separate Bulk API/Data-Manipulation API categories, out of this connector's metadata-only scope
